steps.title: One real solution → discriminant = 0
steps.content: Rearrange to standard form: $5x^2 - 30x + (21 - r) = 0$. So $a = 5$, $b = -30$, $c = 21 - r$. Exactly one solution means $b^2 - 4ac = 0$.

steps.title: Plug in and solve for r
Answer
steps.content: The required value is $r = -24$, so -24 is correct.
